name: Adjustable Phone Stand with Charging Slot
description: Modern 3D-printable phone stand featuring an adjustable cradling mechanism with integrated charging cable management. The stand accommodates various phone sizes and angles, includes textured grip surfaces, and a dedicated bottom cable routing slot. Designed for desktop use with a stable trapezoidal base. Perfect for video calls, content creation, and hands-free viewing. High-demand product combining functionality with aesthetic appeal.

visual_analysis.silhouette: Vertical stand with curved cradle arm rising from trapezoid base, phone-holding groove angled ~75 degrees, cable management cutout at bottom
materials: Textured plastic base with grid pattern
key_features: Curved phone cradle with textured grip surface
Adjustable phone angle via cradle geometry

blender_steps.description: Create base platform (95mm x 8mm x 80mm)

params.code:
import bpy
base = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.bevel(width=0.003, segments=2)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Bevel base edges for print compatibility
Create trapezoid base front section (tapered support)

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=6)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
for v in obj.data.vertices:
    if v.co.x > 0.3:
        v.co.x += v.co.z * 0.15

blender_steps.description: Taper front base section for angled geometry
Union front section to base
Create curved cradle support (radius 35mm)

params.code:
import bpy
import math
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.transform.rotate(value=math.radians(25), orient_axis='X')
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Rotate cradle to 25-degree angle for phone viewing
Create curved cradle lip (torus geometry for smooth grip)

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.bisect(plane_co=(0, 0, 0), plane_no=(0, 0, 1), clear_inner=True)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Bisect torus to create cradle contact surface
Create top cradle pad (phone contact surface)

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.bevel(width=0.001, segments=2)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Bevel cradle pad edges
Create cable management slot (15mm wide, 40mm tall)
Subtract cable slot from base

params.code:
import bpy
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.join()
obj = bpy.context.active_object
obj.name = 'PhoneStand_Body'

blender_steps.description: Join all body components

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=4)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Subdivide for texture detail

params.code:
import bpy
import random
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
for v in obj.data.vertices:
    if v.co.y < -0.025:
        v.co.z += random.uniform(-0.0008, 0.0008)

blender_steps.description: Add subtle base texture variation for visual interest
Apply smooth shading to cradle surfaces
Recalculate all surface normals
Apply matte dark charcoal material to body

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
mat = obj.data.materials[0]
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes['Principled BSDF']
bsdf.inputs['Coat Weight'].default_value = 0.15
bsdf.inputs['Coat Roughness'].default_value = 0.7

blender_steps.description: Add light protective coat finish
Generate UV map for texture application

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.remove_doubles(threshold=0.0001)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Remove any duplicate vertices

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.mark_seam()
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Mark seams for proper mesh continuity
Export final model as STL for 3D printing

notes.printability: Watertight model with 2.5mm minimum wall thickness. Cable slot is 15mm wide for standard USB cables. Cradle angled at 25 degrees optimal for phone viewing. Base grid pattern provides visual appeal and grip.
notes.print_settings: Recommended 20% infill, 0.2mm layer height. Support structures needed under cradle arm. Print time ~4-5 hours at standard speed.
notes.material_considerations: Model optimized for FDM/SLA printing. Textured surfaces provide grip without sharp edges. All features sized for reliable print output.
notes.customization_options: Easily scalable for different phone sizes. Cable slot width can be adjusted. Cradle angle can be modified by rotation parameter.

Adjustable Phone Stand with Charging Slot — Large
variations.description: Scaled up 10% for larger market segment
